--- Domain Rules (Alignment Patterns) ---
- Alignment Mapping: If the text states the bases of multiple objects are 'ALIGNED ON THE SAME HORIZONTAL LEVEL', this implies they form a 'Row', their arrangement is 'Horizontal', and they 'Align with each other'.

- Corner Proximity: To find an item closest to the 'bottom right corner', find the object that is simultaneously closest to the camera (Depth) and furthest to the right (Horizontal).
